title: alsine sedoides
intro: Alsine sedoides, also known as Alsine or Sedum anacarpum, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western Himalayas. Alsine sedoides has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea for its health benefits.
